import string
import io
import list

fn parse_ints(_ line: String) -> List<Int>
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  let n = string.len(line)
  mut i = 0
  mut in_num = false
  mut sign = 1
  mut val = 0
  while i < n
    let b = match string.byte_at(line, i)
    when Some(x)
      x
    when None
      0
    end
    if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
      if in_num
        result = list.push(result, val * sign)
        in_num = false
        sign = 1
        val = 0
      end
    else if b == 45 and not in_num
      sign = -1
      in_num = true
    else if b == 43 and not in_num
      in_num = true
    else if b >= 48 and b <= 57
      val = val * 10 + (b - 48)
      in_num = true
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  if in_num
    result = list.push(result, val * sign)
  end
  result
end

fn sorted_insert(_ xs: List<Int>, _ v: Int) -> List<Int>
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  mut inserted = false
  mut i = 0
  let n = xs.len()
  while i < n
    let cur = match xs.get(i)
    when Some(x)
      x
    when None
      0
    end
    if not inserted and v < cur
      result = list.push(result, v)
      result = list.push(result, cur)
      inserted = true
    else if not inserted and v == cur
      result = list.push(result, cur)
      inserted = true
    else
      result = list.push(result, cur)
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  if not inserted
    result = list.push(result, v)
  end
  result
end

fn get_or_zero(_ xs: List<Int>, _ i: Int) -> Int
  match xs.get(i)
  when Some(x)
    x
  when None
    0
  end
end

fn main() -> Unit
  let line1 = match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end
  let line2 = match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end
  let a = parse_ints(line1)
  let b = parse_ints(line2)
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  mut i = 0
  while i < a.len()
    result = sorted_insert(result, get_or_zero(a, i))
    i = i + 1
  end
  mut j = 0
  while j < b.len()
    result = sorted_insert(result, get_or_zero(b, j))
    j = j + 1
  end
  mut out = ""
  mut k = 0
  while k < result.len()
    let v = get_or_zero(result, k)
    if k == 0
      out = "#{v}"
    else
      out = "#{out} #{v}"
    end
    k = k + 1
  end
  println(out)
end
